source_configs.name: Transcript parser
source_configs.type: Keynote / earnings call / analyst Q&A parsing

alerts.title: NVDA platform language shifts toward next-gen compute intensity
alerts.condition: Trigger on Blackwell, Rubin, GPU scaling, compute intensity, accelerator demand, or next-gen platform language.
alerts.action: Raise compute platform priority and check upstream packaging/foundry readthrough.

alerts.title: NVDA mentions context memory, KV cache, or memory hierarchy
alerts.condition: Trigger on context memory, KV cache, memory hierarchy, or AI-native storage language.

alerts.title: MU highlights HBM shipments, pricing discipline, or gross margin
alerts.condition: Trigger on HBM, DRAM, shipments, pricing discipline, margin expansion, or AI memory demand.
alerts.action: Raise memory sensitivity and update revenue / GM / EPS bridge.

alerts.title: SNDK highlights design wins, SSD tiering, or flash inference relevance
alerts.condition: Trigger on design win, SSD, NAND, flash, context memory, storage tier, or inference storage language.
alerts.action: Raise storage-tier relevance and monitor commercialization timing.

alerts.title: Networking language shifts toward scale-out or fabric bottlenecks
alerts.condition: Trigger on scale-out, network fabric, rack-scale, ethernet, interconnect, or bandwidth bottleneck language.
alerts.action: Raise networking cluster sensitivity and review NVDA readthrough.

alerts.title: Optics language strengthens around optical interconnect or photonics
alerts.condition: Trigger on optics, optical interconnect, photonics, co-packaged optics, or optical scaling language.
alerts.action: Raise optics cluster priority and compare against networking bottleneck commentary.

alerts.title: AI deployment highlights liquid cooling, thermal limits, or power constraints
alerts.condition: Trigger on liquid cooling, rack density, thermal bottleneck, power constraint, or data center power language.
alerts.action: Raise deployment bottleneck importance and monitor timing impact.

alerts.title: Advanced packaging or foundry tightness reappears in AI supply chain
alerts.condition: Trigger on advanced packaging, CoWoS, foundry, packaging capacity, yield, or supply tightness language.
alerts.action: Raise upstream constraint sensitivity and monitor shipment timing risk.

alerts.title: Custom watchlist ticker has unusual price move without mapped event
alerts.condition: Trigger when a front-end temporary custom ticker shows a large move but no linked event intelligence exists.
alerts.action: Prompt manual review and add temporary analyst note into event feed.

NVDA.label: AI factory / inference demand
NVDA.note: Broader system demand expands platform revenue opportunity.

NVDA.label: Deployment speed
NVDA.note: Faster validated deployment accelerates revenue conversion; delays push timing right.

MU.label: HBM shipments
MU.note: Shipment growth directly lifts AI memory revenue.

MU.label: Pricing discipline
MU.note: Constructive pricing improves gross margin and EPS conversion.

SNDK.label: Context memory relevance
SNDK.note: Can re-rate SNDK from commodity NAND to AI storage layer.

SNDK.label: Design wins / sampling
SNDK.note: Commercial validation is required for roadmap to become earnings.

ANET.label: Scale-out cluster demand
ANET.note: Bigger AI clusters increase switching and fabric spend.

ANET.label: AI network attach
ANET.note: Higher-value AI networking can lift margin mix.

VRT.label: Liquid cooling adoption
VRT.note: Denser AI racks raise cooling and thermal-management demand.

VRT.label: Power infrastructure content
VRT.note: AI-ready data center builds expand electrical wallet share.

TSM.label: Advanced packaging demand
TSM.note: AI ramps increase packaging and foundry utilization.

TSM.label: Capacity tightness
TSM.note: Tight supply supports price but can limit volume.

MRVL.label: AI interconnect demand
MRVL.note: System-level connectivity ramps increase custom infrastructure demand.

MRVL.label: Custom silicon relevance
MRVL.note: Higher-value infrastructure chips can support margin quality.

ALAB.label: Rack-scale design wins
ALAB.note: As rack becomes the unit of compute, attach opportunities rise.

ALAB.label: AI IO content growth
ALAB.note: Richer connectivity layers increase platform relevance.

CRDO.label: High-speed interconnect demand
CRDO.note: AI fabric growth supports cable and interconnect content.

CRDO.label: Bandwidth bottlenecks
CRDO.note: More demanding clusters support richer product mix.

LITE.label: Optics demand
LITE.note: AI data center scaling supports optical module and photonics demand.

LITE.label: Bandwidth scaling
LITE.note: Larger AI systems need denser and faster optical connectivity.

COHR.label: Optics and integration demand
COHR.note: AI growth drives optics and package integration relevance.

COHR.label: Advanced packaging tie-in
COHR.note: Deeper system integration supports higher-value positioning.
